creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to jakub_lach from comment #9)

FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-c84ec3076 amd64

$ pkg info | grep 'kmod'

mesa-dri-22.3.3_2              OpenGL hardware acceleration drivers for DRI2+
